entries.birth_input_summary: Profil synthetique ne le 1990-01-15 a 10:30, Paris, Europe/Paris.
entries.execution_trace: Desktop and mobile CS-306 browser screenshots exercised /natal success rendering with chart_id-based B2C projections; this CS-310 profile maps that success path to a synthetic precise-time Paris input.
entries.visible_notes: Baseline navigateur CS-306 affiche Resume debutant et Interpretation client sur /natal.

entries.birth_input_summary: Profil synthetique ne le 1990-01-15 sans heure, Paris, Europe/Paris.
entries.execution_trace: NatalChartPage covers degraded_mode=no_time, natalInterpretation covers payload state=degraded, and backend pytest covers birth_input without birth_time.
entries.visible_notes: Le bandeau heure manquante et la projection state=degraded sont couverts; l'ascendant absent est explique.

entries.birth_input_summary: Profil synthetique ne le 1988-07-04 a 22:15, Tokyo, Asia/Tokyo.
entries.execution_trace: The API client fixture proves birth place/timezone normalization through the central client; the backend birth_input source test proves the projection endpoint accepts explicit birth input. No country-specific UI branch exists.
entries.visible_notes: Le contrat accepte birth_input avec lieu/fuseau explicites; le client central normalise les donnees de naissance.

entries.birth_input_summary: Profil synthetique avec donnees de naissance volontairement incompletes ou chart_id absent.
entries.execution_trace: NatalChartPage covers birth_profile_not_found and 422 alerts, natalInterpretation covers projection API error state, and backend pytest covers public 404/422 projection errors.
entries.visible_notes: Les erreurs 4xx/incomplete data et l'erreur API projection affichent des messages bornes avec retry quand pertinent.

entries.birth_input_summary: Profil synthetique ne le 1995-11-23 a 08:45, Lyon, Europe/Paris.
entries.execution_trace: The standard profile reuses the same /natal success rendering path as the CS-306 browser ledger and the targeted interpretation tests for both B2C projection cards.
entries.visible_notes: Le rendu standard affiche les deux projections et les mentions legales applicatives.
